title: Pivot stratégique
sources: README.md: ROMAP progression and Phase 1 objectives
quests.ts: Foundational quest specifications for District C
database.sql: Memo table schema for local PostgreSQL storage
forom-config.ts: Category and question label mapping
App.tsx: Currency and quest reward logic
resume: The quest 'Pivot stratégique' (C9) represents a critical emergency maneuver within the Stratégie district, situated at coordinate C9 on the 10x10 Finite Rom Map grid. In the architectural framework of Forom, the 'Urgence' tag (9) is reserved for megathreads or systemic shifts that demand immediate, collective attention from the entire node. This quest is triggered when the existing strategic roadmap (finalized in C5 and canonized in C8) faces an existential challenge or a fundamental change in the external ecosystem, requiring a total redirection of the community's path to achieve its mission: 'Save human communities and long-term memory.' During Phase 1: The Foundations (V1), a strategic pivot is a high-stakes event, as it necessitates re-evaluating the 100 foundational memos being built to ensure they remain relevant to the new direction. Technically, this pivot is documented in the local PostgreSQL database within the 'memos' table, ensuring that the rationale and the new strategic coordinates are preserved as sovereign 'Deep Lore.' The Forom stack, utilizing React 19 and Vite 7, renders this emergency shift within a spatial 5x5 viewport, signaling to all 1209 potential users that a structural change is underway. The 'Guardian' role (Red) is paramount during this crisis, tasked with maintaining stability and enforcing the rules while the 'Creator' role (Yellow) works to build the new tools or content required by the pivot. Economically, completing this quest in V1 rewards the participant with 2 Pixels (PX) and 10 XP, though the 9 Super-Moderators might deploy their 500 PX initial treasury to stabilize the transition. By hosting this data locally on an NVIDIA Jetson, the community ensures that its internal strategic vulnerabilities and the details of its pivot remain private and sovereign. This archived memory is essential for future generations, like those in the 70 ETS Student Clubs, to understand how the community adapted to unforeseen challenges. Eventually, ROM—the local RAG engine—will digest this C9 memo in Phase 3 to provide better predictive support for future crises. Documenting the 'Pivot stratégique' at C9 transforms a moment of strategic instability into a permanent asset of community intelligence, securing the node's survival against entropy. This entry is now canonized for the decade. Every member contributes to the evolution. The mission is preserved through adaptation. Structural integrity is maintained. The community resilience is our greatest asset in this digital matrix. We must adapt or vanish. This pivot ensures our longevity. Forom stands strong. Mission secure.
summary: This quest facilitates a critical redirection of the community strategy at coordinate C9, ensuring that emergency strategic shifts are archived as sovereign deep lore.
